title: athlete-guardian — permissions
description: Two audiences. Tenant plane (sanctum) — Guardian CRUD by admin / owner / hr / reception, self-service via .own scope for guardians managing their own guardianships. Platform plane (platform_admin) — cross-tenant read + verification audit for compliance ops.

permissions.name: athlete_guardians.viewAny.own
permissions.description: Guardian-scoped listing — narrows to rows where user_id = current_user_id.

permissions.name: athlete_guardians.view.own
permissions.description: Self-view for the guardian on their own row, OR guardian viewing another guardian on the same athlete (co-parent visibility).

permissions.name: athlete_guardians.create
permissions.description: Add a new guardian. Fires GuardianAdded + dispatches VerifyGuardianByEmailDomainJob. Refuses when the tier limit is exceeded.

permissions.name: athlete_guardians.update
permissions.description: Update role flags + relationship + notes. is_primary + verification transitions use dedicated permissions below.

permissions.name: athlete_guardians.update.own
permissions.description: Guardians update their own role-flag preferences (can_receive_communications, can_pickup, can_authorise_medical_care — subject to has_legal_custody). Relationship, has_legal_custody, and is_primary are admin-only.

permissions.name: athlete_guardians.delete
permissions.description: Soft-delete a guardian. Refused when the guardian is the sole active guardian for a minor athlete.

permissions.name: athlete_guardians.set-primary
permissions.description: Atomic promote-and-demote of the primary guardian. Same permission covers both directions.

permissions.name: athlete_guardians.verify
permissions.description: HR verify action. Requires athlete_guardian_verification entitlement (Enterprise) for the endpoint to be enabled. Transitions pending/disputed → verified with document upload.

permissions.name: athlete_guardians.dispute
permissions.description: Flag a verified guardian for review. Blocks consent recording until resolved.

permissions.name: athlete_guardians.revoke
permissions.description: Terminal revocation. Requires reason. Auto-flips is_primary + auto-elects a new primary.

permissions.name: athlete_guardians.audit.verification
permissions.description: Compliance export — the tenant's guardian verification audit trail.

permissions.name: platform.athlete_guardians.audit-verification
permissions.description: Support-tooling verification audit. Super_admin only with two-person approval.
